summary: Created MPI-163 (HIGH/blocking) — engine-aware dependency resolution. The MPI-157 split is HALF-WIRED: engine tag filters DOWNLOAD but NOT the status gate (isModelUsable/isOperationInstalled walk resolveFullUniverse = ALL deps incl bf16). Fresh GGUF-only Pod volume -> bf16 legitimately absent -> gate fails -> no prompt box (worked on old volume only because it had BOTH transformers). FIX (user design): per-model dependencies+localDeps+remoteDeps, drop per-dep engine tag, engine-param on resolveDeps so every consumer derives the engine-correct set. Also moves GGUF node to remoteDeps (currently installs locally for nothing) + replaces ggufWhenRemote bool. CURRENT STATE BROKEN on fresh Pod until this lands.
Picked up — implementing engine-aware resolver (localDeps/remoteDeps + engine param), Core + move GGUF node scope (workflow swap left as-is).

Live Pod (A100 GGUF-only) exposed a HALF-WIRE I left: gate fixed but the manager footprint (_computePartial/sizeDepIds/vram via _draftDepIds) + force-local preflight (_findModelNotLocal /comfy/models/check-local) still resolved the UNION -> card read PARTIALLY INSTALLED 22/85.8GB (bf16 41GB absent). Fixed: _draftDepIds now engine-scoped (cascades to partial bar + size), vram/size use resolveFullUniverse(model,null,engine), _findModelNotLocal always resolves local. Swept ALL call sites. Gotcha + feedback memory written so it cannot recur. Tests 10/10. Needs app RELOAD then re-test on the Pod.

LIVE-VERIFIED end-to-end on A100 GGUF-only Pod: LTX installed (44.8GB GGUF set, NOT 85.8 union; bf16 never fetched), prompt box returned, gen unblocked. Two-pass fix: gate (546b0f6) + footprint/preflight sweep (0572bd1). Accepted by user.
Archived completed card during board cleanup.
